news.t: The Vanguard Mega Cap ETF Implied Analyst Target Price: $125
Add Up The Parts: The Vanguard Mega Cap ETF Could Be Worth $114
Analysts Forecast 10% Upside For The Vanguard Mega Cap ETF
The Implied Analyst 12-Month Target For The Vanguard Mega Cap ETF

holdings.infoBox: MGC is an equity ETF with a total of 182 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 9.09%, Apple at 8.55%, Microsoft at 6.24%, Amazon.com at 4.88%, and Alphabet at 4.13%.

overview.description: The Vanguard Mega Cap ETF (MGC) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the CRSP US Mega Cap index. The fund tracks a market cap-weighted index of mega-cap stocks in the US. MGC was launched on Dec 24, 2007 and is issued by Vanguard.

data.text: For the Vanguard Mega Cap ETF (MGC), we found that the implied analyst target price for the ETF based upon its underlying holdings is $124.70 per unit.
